## Summary
<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Keep it to one focused concern. -->


## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / config

## Checklist
- [ ] Builds locally (`dotnet build` and/or `npm run build`)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, passwords, or real `.env` values are committed
- [ ] DB schema changes include an EF migration (`dotnet ef migrations add ...`)
- [ ] Docs / README updated where relevant
- [ ] Targets `main` and is scoped to a single concern

## Screenshots / notes
<!-- For UI changes, add before/after screenshots. Note anything reviewers should know. -->
